dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7631 IH: Rural Water Security Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Pettersen (for herself, Mr. Hurd of Colorado, Mr. Crank, Mr. Crow, Ms. DeGette, Mr. Evans of Colorado, and Mr. Neguse) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure

form.official-title: To amend the Water Resources Development Act of 1999 to include Colorado in a program for western rural water, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Rural Water Security Act.
Section 595 of the Water Resources Development Act of 1999 is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (b), by inserting Colorado, before Arizona;
in subsection (c)(1), by inserting Colorado, before Arizona; and
in subsection (i)(1), by inserting Colorado, before Idaho.
